JavaScript tests for properties and behavior of `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`.


## Files
- **[15.07.03.05-001.js](15.07.03.05-001.js.md)**: Tests if the Number object has the property "NEGATIVE_INFINITY".
- **[15.07.03.05-002.js](15.07.03.05-002.js.md)**: Tests that `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` is not finite and is less than zero.

- **[15.07.03.05-006.js](15.07.03.05-006.js.md)**: Tests that the "NEGATIVE_INFINITY" property does not exist in the Number object.
- **[15.07.03.05-007.js](15.07.03.05-007.js.md)**: Tests if the 'NEGATIVE_INFINITY' property of Number is not enumerable.
